title: Jito Bundle
description: An atomic, ordered list of up to five base-58 or base-64 encoded signed Solana transactions submitted to the Jito Block Engine. If any transaction fails the entire bundle reverts. A SOL tip to a designated tip account is required for inclusion.

transactions.description: Signed Solana transactions, encoded as base-58 (default) or base-64.

tipAccount.description: Designated Jito tip account public key receiving the SOL tip from one of the bundle transactions.

tipLamports.description: SOL tip amount in lamports paid to the tip account within the bundle.
